prediction.reasoning: Based on ADBE's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annually (~2.4% weekly standard deviation), the stock shows typical tech stock price movements. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal price distribution with widening ranges to account for increased uncertainty over the 7-day horizon.
